title: WorkCanvas power hour: pro tips & new features [Webinar Recording]

posts.author: bridieca (Bridie Castiel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Co-founder of monday WorkCavnas, @GuyWorkCanvas joined us for another awesome session to help you unlock new ways to visually plan, execute, and enhance your productivity with WorkCanvas. Including:

  • Pro tips to setting up canvases effortlessly
  • Sharing personalized reusable templates across your organization—or even externally
  • Organizing data seamlessly with our brand-new Table element
  • Planning projects like a pro using Gantt charts for efficient scheduling and task dependencies

Watch the recording here.

Any follow up questions for Guy? Share below!
